environments.riskRationale: Source host ordering can be resolved without runtime evidence

ledger.entryState: Home is interactive and the drawer is closed
ledger.feedback: The drawer begins tracking the pan
ledger.cancellation: Reversing the pan returns the drawer closed
ledger.recovery: A cancelled gesture leaves Home interactive
ledger.claim: The drawer tracks the opening gesture continuously.
ledger.expected: The drawer remains attached to the gesture.
ledger.observed: The drawer remained attached in all fixture runs.

ledger.completion: The confirmation appears above the drawer
ledger.cancellation: Cancel returns focus to the drawer
ledger.recovery: A failed presentation leaves the drawer usable
ledger.claim: The confirmation host is mounted above the drawer host.
ledger.expected: The confirmation host is above the drawer portal.
ledger.observed: The confirmation is mounted beneath the native modal host.
reproduction: Inspect the drawer and confirmation hosts

ledger.task: Predict the result of each drawer action
ledger.feedback: The interface presents the action labels
ledger.completion: The participant states a predicted result
ledger.cancellation: The participant can skip an action
ledger.recovery: The facilitator records uncertainty without prompting
ledger.claim: People understand the drawer action labels.
ledger.expected: Target participants predict each action correctly.
reproduction: Run a comprehension study with the target population
ledger.studyQuestion: Can target participants predict the result of each drawer action?

excludedDomains.reason: The bounded drawer audit does not change routes
Gesture continuity is represented by the gesture claim
No timing budget is part of this fixture
Accessibility behavior is outside this fixture
The fixture targets one fixed layout
Feedback is represented inside the gesture claim
No asynchronous or failure state is in scope
No personal or sensitive content is presented
Resource behavior is outside this fixture

excludedEnvironments.reason: The fixture is an iOS account-drawer audit
